title: T_O_R Totems
description:
A MineCraft BedRock Texture Pack That Changes The Totem Of UnDying To Members From "That_One_Realm"!

JAVA BUILD W.I.P.
body:
A MineCraft BedRock Texture Pack That Changes The Totem Of UnDying To Members From "That_One_Realm"!
  
There Are Many High-Quality Totems For You To Choose From!
   
Once DownLoaded, All You Have To Do Is Read The "READ ME.txt". Once You've Followed The ReadMe Steps, You Just Have To Open MineCraft, Go To Resource Packs, And Activate It! :D
  
All Of The Totems Other Than "Dumbo", And "T_O_R" Were Made Using https://r2beeaton.com/t/.
     

T_O_R:     
https://www.youtube.com/@That_One_Realm     
thatonerealm.com

JAVA BUILD W.I.P.
